meaning: adj.鍘勭摐澶氬皵鐨刵.鍘勭摐澶氬皵
examples: The aircraft belonged to Ecuador Airline, but it had been chartered by Air France for the route from Bogota to the Ecuadorian capital Quito.
We took an underweight position in Ecuadorian bonds.
During each of Kalish and Fisher's visits, an Ecuadorian man familiar with the Achuar served as guide and translator.
WikiLeaks founder Julian Assange has taken refuge in the Ecuadorian Embassy in London since last month.
One-year measurements of surface heat budget on the ablation zone of Antizana Glacier 15, Ecuadorian Andes.
